Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to prohibiting the operation of horse drawn cabs, and to repeal sections 17-334.1, 19-174, 20-377, 20-377.1, 20-380, 20-381, 20-381.1, 20-381.2, 20-382 and subdivisions b, c, and d of section 20-383 of the administrative code of the city of New York, relating to carriage horses and horse drawn cabs, and to repeal sections thirteen, nineteen, and twenty-one of this local law upon the expiration thereof
Items.MatterName: Prohibiting the operation of horse drawn cabs.
